name: Ask Concentration Z-Score (Pinnacle)
hypothesis: This is the final test of the ask_depth_concentration z-score signal. Pushing to an even more extreme quantile (z=6.0) should isolate the absolute highest conviction signals, potentially sacrificing trade count for a new peak in win rate and expectancy, as suggested by prior feedback.
mutation_note: Per `signal-improver` recommendation based on `iter008_ask_conc_final_push` feedback, tightened threshold from 5.5 to 6.0 to confirm the absolute performance peak of this signal family.
